import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "./Home.css"; const heroImage = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522708323590-d24dbb6b0267?fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"; const listingsData = [ { id: 1, name: "Luxury Beach Villa", location: "Goa", price: 12500, rating: 4.8, guests: 4, image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/2102587/pexels-photo-2102587.jpeg", description: "Wake up to ocean waves and golden sunsets in this luxurious seaside villa.", }, { id: 2, name: "Cozy Mountain Cabin", location: "Manali", price: 8500, rating: 4.6, guests: 3, image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/277572/pexels-photo-277572.jpeg", description: "Experience peace and pine forests with stunning snow-clad mountain views.", }, { id: 3, name: "Modern City Apartment", location: "Mumbai", price: 9500, rating: 4.7, guests: 2, image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/271624/pexels-photo-271624.jpeg", description: "Enjoy modern amenities and city lights in the heart of Mumbai.", }, { id: 4, name: "Heritage Palace Stay", location: "Jaipur", price: 7800, rating: 4.9, guests: 5, image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/259588/pexels-photo-259588.jpeg", description: "Feel royal in this heritage palace with Rajasthani décor and hospitality.", }, ]; export default function Home() { const [filters, setFilters] = useState({ location: "", checkIn: "", checkOut: "", guests: "", }); const filteredListings = listingsData.filter((home) => home.location.toLowerCase().includes(filters.location.toLowerCase()) ); const handleChange = (e) => { setFilters({ ...filters, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Find Your Dream Stay

Book unique homes, hotels, and experiences — anywhere in India 🌏

{/* Enhanced Search Bar */}
{/* Listings Section */}

Explore Our Top Picks

{filteredListings.length > 0 ? ( filteredListings.map((home) => (
⭐ {home.rating}

{home.name}

📍 {home.location}

{home.description}

₹{home.price.toLocaleString()} / night 👥 {home.guests} guests
)) ) : (

No results found. Try another location.

)}
); }
